headlines.title: President Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Trump was greeted in Beijing with a welcome ceremony ahead of his two-day summit with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: How Trump's Summit in China Will Differ From His 2017 Visit
headlines.description: NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas joins TODAY from Beijing to talk about what to expect from President Donald Trump’s high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi Jinping. He breaks down how the visit will be different from his visit nine years ago in 2017, why Trump is expected to ask for help in negotiating a Strait of Hormuz deal and what to make of the high-profile guest list that includes tech leaders Elon Musk and Tim Cook.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the United States, it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: A third of Congressional Black Caucus could be wiped out by redistricting, Democrats warn
headlines.description: The Congressional Black Caucus is expected to dramatically lose membership because of the Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.

headlines.title: Police receive threat against Brad Raffensperger ahead of bomb scare
headlines.description: Brad Raffensperger, Georgia’s secretary of state, has faced threats after publicly disputing President Trump’s false claims that he won the state in 2020.

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.

headlines.title: Alabama jail staff didn’t help when she went into labor — other inmates did, lawsuit says
headlines.description: In a state with a long history of arresting pregnant women, one mom in custody says she was left to fend for herself.

headlines.title: King Charles enters stage of Britain’s political drama as Keir Starmer faces down challengers
headlines.description: LONDON — Plotters trying to bring down the British prime minister.

headlines.title: ICE might be at World Cup matches in U.S.
headlines.description: ICE may be at FIFA World Cup matches in the U.S., sources say

headlines.title: States Reporting Potential Hantavirus Exposure Grows to 16
headlines.description: Sixteen states are reporting potential hantavirus exposures, including Minnesota, Kansas and Washington state. Health officials say most of the cases involve people who left the cruise ship at the center of an outbreak before it was identified or others who traveled with exposed passengers. They say all are asymptomatic and isolating at home. NBC’s Maggie Vespa reports for TODAY.
